response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering breadth with 20 years of professional experience and strong communication skills, he fails to meet critical mandatory requirements. His C++ expertise ended over a decade ago (6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), far below the required 5-10 years of current hands-on C++ development. Additionally, his entire career has focused on web, mobile, and open-source systems with no Windows platform or financial services domain exposure—both of which are mandatory for this capital markets role. His skill set is fundamentally misaligned with the position's core technical and domain requirements.
strengths: 20+ years of professional software development with proven ability to deliver high-performance, production systems handling millions of requests
Strong communication and mentorship skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and staff-level technical leadership roles
Java development experience and demonstrated CI/CD infrastructure expertise, which are optional desirable skills
concerns: C++ experience is 10+ years outdated with only 6 months of recent exposure; mandatory requirement is 5-10 years of current expertise
Zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking systems; entirely missing required domain expertise
Career trajectory exclusively in web/backend, mobile, and open-source domains with no Windows platform development history

key_factors.factor: Complete absence of capital markets or financial services domain knowledge
